boundary: Mechanical refinement inventory has all declared targets checked and rotate_epoch_full transparency-commit fail-closed proof lane complete within its stated narrow scope.

entries.boundary: decode_arc_object has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for bounded malformed parser rejection and deterministic rejection behavior. Full parser equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust decoder must reject malformed and over-limit ARC objects consistently with Coq encoding safety assumptions.

entries.boundary: encode_arc_object has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for deterministic encoding, non-empty output, ARC magic/header stability, version-1 layout stability, and object_id binding. Full encode/decode round-trip and byte-level serialization equivalence remain outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust encoder must produce canonical ARC object encodings compatible with the Coq encoding model.

entries.boundary: context_hash has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for all four context transcript model harnesses: determinism, policy-hash binding, epoch binding, and capability-stamp binding.
entries.obligation: Rust context_hash must bind object, rights, policy, authority, and temporal context as modeled in Coq.

entries.boundary: verify has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for fail-closed authority-verifier rejection propagation, deterministic rejection, early rejection before capability proof success, and no-panic behavior on a bounded invalid authority surface. Full cryptographic verification equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust verify must accept only when capability, revocation, temporal, authority, wrapper, and transparency gates hold.

entries.boundary: open has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for fail-closed authority-verifier rejection propagation, deterministic rejection, early rejection before capability validation/decryption, and no-panic behavior on a bounded invalid authority surface. Full cryptographic open/decryption equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust open must refine the Coq master open invariant and reject missing authorization gates.

entries.boundary: seal has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for fail-closed authority-verifier rejection propagation, deterministic rejection, early rejection before capability validation/encryption, and no-panic behavior on a bounded invalid authority surface. Full cryptographic sealing equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust seal must refine the Coq lifecycle seal transition.

entries.boundary: add_epoch_wrapper has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for fail-closed authority-verifier rejection propagation, deterministic rejection, early rejection before capability validation/rewrap, and wrapper-count preservation on rejection. Full cryptographic rewrap equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust add_epoch_wrapper must refine rewrap and epoch-wrapper state-machine rules.

entries.boundary: rotate_epoch has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for the pure authority-state transition used by rotate_epoch: requested epoch binding, authority root preservation, revocation root preservation, root key preservation, authority identity preservation, revocation count preservation, transparency-root reset, previous-epoch-hash binding, validity flag initialization, and determinism. Fresh epoch key generation and certificate cryptographic correctness remain outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust rotate_epoch must strictly advance epoch state.

entries.boundary: rotate_epoch_full has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for its extracted commit/finalization phase for fail-closed transparency-log commit rejection propagation, deterministic rejection, non-observability of successful commit material when commit_state fails, and store_chain_hash non-reachability on commit failure. Full successful transparency-commit semantic equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust rotate_epoch_full must preserve authority transition and transparency linkage obligations.

entries.boundary: capability_tree has a mechanical Merkle/capability proof refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust capability tree proof logic must refine Coq Merkle membership and revocation models.

entries.boundary: transparency has a mechanical append/lookup/conflict refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust transparency append or equivalent log extension logic must refine Coq append-only behavior.
